name: German Ambrosia Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mix the frosting packet from the frosting mix with whipping cream in a small mixer bowl (just to blend - it will whip later). Chill.
Prepare and bake the cake mix according to package directions using a 13x9 inch prepared pan. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing to cool completely. Slice into 2 layers. Spread marmalade between layers.
Beat the whipping cream mixture until stiff. Fold in the coconut-pecan packet. Spread over top and sides of the cake. Chill until serving time.
